ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued To Oct-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff's counsel and Cassandra Francois, Esq. appeared on behalf of the defendant.Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to October 07, 2025, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Coralia Lesin , Esq., of RAYMOND GHERMEZIAN, A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION. for plaintiff.(Special Appearance)
Cassandra P. Francois, Esq., of Bledsoe, Diestel, Treppa & Crane LLP Te:415-981-5411 for defendant.
No other appearances made in this matter.

A hearing is required. There was no appearance by the attorney of record or by Danny Harris. Counsel Coralia Lesin appeared specially on behalf of the attorney of record and informed the Court that counsel Raymond Ghermezian is currently engaged in mediation. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DANNY HARRIS' MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is off calendar without prejudice.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Off Calendar May-30-2025 Continued To Aug-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-02-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Cassandra Francois, Esq. 415-981-5411 Bledsoe Dietsel Treppa and Crane LLP for Defendant Cafe Okawari
No other appearance.

Hearing is held. Defense counsel Ms Francois, states she is not opposing the court's tentative ruling and would like to hear the ruling on the matter. The Court's tentative ruling was hearing required, there being no appearance by moving party or plaintiff the Court vacates the tentative ruling and the matter is off-calendar.

Raymond Ghermezian's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel for PLaintiff Danny Harris.

The court vacates the tentative ruling, the matter is Off-calendar. No Appearance by parties.

The proposed order sent via email prior to the hearing is not signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
